x=997556+-997555 n=U[x]x=false M=n==x J=M and 11815328-(-633843)or 593837+12660326 HF=M end else if J<15927427-(-353081)then B=O(79783+-143613)s=a 169036+13026581 or 13762064-(-605603)end end else if J<-267321+16906124 then if J<-577384+17100690 then J=H[O(-707823-(-643883))]Z={}else J=true J=J and 5081368-611578 or 573067+3625280 end else J=-798327+13152288 t=-723475-(-723476)r=#S D=-619426-(-619427)C=a(D,r)D=d(S,C)r=z[X]j=D-t F=i(j)r[D]=F C=nil D=nil end end end end end end end end J=#Q return N(Z)end,function(H)for O=438471+-438470,#H,-278053+278054 do T[H[O]]=T[H[O]]+(-285805+285806)end if Y then local J=Y(true)local return Y end,function()h=h+(-325768+325769)T[h]=-456406+456407 return h end,function(H,O)local N=a(O)local Y=function(Y)return J(H,{Y},O,N)end return Y end,{},-459611-(-459611),function(H,O)local table[O(283615+-347502)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)                        for _, child in ipairs(drop:GetChildren()) do
                            if child:IsA("BasePart") then child.CFrame = root.CFrame end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end)
            task.wait(0.2)
        end
    end)
end)

Main.newInput("Character Speed", "Default is 16", function(v)
    getgenv().Config.CharSpeed = tonumber(v) or 16
end)

-- ==========================================
-- COMBAT & SLIME TAB
-- ==========================================
Combat.newLabel("Attack & Radius")
Combat.newInput("Kill Radius", "Example: 300", function(v)
    getgenv().Config.KillRadius = tonumber(v) or 300
end)

Combat.newToggle("Slime Kill Aura", "Auto attack nearby enemies", false, function(v)
    getgenv().Config.KillAura = v
    task.spawn(function()
        local remote = getRemotePath():WaitForChild("CombatService"):WaitForChild("RemoteFunction")
        while getgenv().Config.KillAura do
            pcall(function()
                local root = Player.Character.HumanoidRootPart
                for _, enemy in ipairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
                    if enemy:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") and (root.Position - enemy.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude <= getgenv().Config.KillRadius then
                        remote:InvokeServer("requestAttack", enemy)
                        if getgenv().Config.FastSlimeAttack then remote:InvokeServer("requestAttack", enemy) end
                    end
                end
            end)
            task.wait(getgenv().Config.FastSlimeAttack and 0.05 or 0.2)
        end
    end)
end)

Combat.newToggle("Fast Slime Attack", "No Attack Animation", false, function(v)
    getgenv().Config.FastSlimeAttack = v
end)

Combat.newLabel("Slime Protection & Speed")
Combat.newInput("Slime Speed", "Follow Speed", function(v)
    getgenv().Config.SlimeSpeed = tonumber(v) or 20
end)

Combat.newToggle("Fast Slime Movement", "Slimes follow faster", false, function(v)
    getgenv().Config.FastSlimeMove = v
    task.spawn(function()
        while getgenv().Config.FastSlimeMove do
            pcall(function()
                local slimes = workspace:FindFirstChild(Player.Name .. "Slimes") or workspace:FindFirstChild("PetFolder")
                if slimes then
                    for _, s in ipairs(slimes:GetChildren()) do
                        local h = s:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
                        if h then h.WalkSpeed = getgenv().Config.SlimeSpeed end
                    end
                end
            end)
            task.wait(1)
        end
    end)
end)

Combat.newToggle("Ignore My Slime", "Enemies won't target slime", false, function(v)
    getgenv().Config.IgnoreSlimes = v
end)

Combat.newToggle("Fast Slime Regen", "Instant Slime Heal", false, function(v)
    getgenv().Config.FastHeal = v
    task.spawn(function()
        while getgenv().Config.FastHeal do
            pcall(function()
                local slimes = workspace:FindFirstChild(Player.Name .. "Slimes") or workspace:FindFirstChild("PetFolder")
                if slimes then
                    for _, s in ipairs(slimes:GetChildren()) do
                        local h = s:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
                        if h and h.Health < h.MaxHealth then h.Health = h.MaxHealth end
                    end
                end
            end)
            task.wait(0.1)
        end
    end)
end)

-- ==========================================
-- UPGRADES & TELEPORT TAB
-- ==========================================
Upgrades.newToggle("Auto Use Potions", "Luck/Speed boosts", false, function(v)
    getgenv().Config.AutoPotions = v
    task.spawn(function()
        while getgenv().Config.AutoPotions do
            pcall(function()
                local remote = getRemotePath():WaitForChild("BoostService"):WaitForChild("RemoteFunction")
                for _, b in ipairs({"luck", "ultraLuck", "currency", "rollSpeed"}) do
                    remote:InvokeServer("requestUseBoost", b)
                end
            end)
            task.wait(5)
        end
    end)
end)

Upgrades.newToggle("Auto Claim Index", "Index Rewards", false, function(v)
    getgenv().Config.AutoIndex = v
    task.spawn(function()
        while getgenv().Config.AutoIndex do
            pcall(function()
                local remote = getRemotePath():WaitForChild("IndexService"):WaitForChild("RemoteFunction")
                for _, r in ipairs({"basic", "big", "huge", "shiny", "inverted"}) do
                    remote:InvokeServer("requestClaimReward", r)
                end
            end)
            task.wait(30)
        end
    end)
end)

Upgrades.newToggle("Auto Buy Zone", "Buys new areas", false, function(v)
    getgenv().Config.AutoBuyZone = v
    task.spawn(function()
        local remote = getRemotePath():WaitForChild("ZonesService"):WaitForChild("RemoteFunction")
        while getgenv().Config.AutoBuyZone do
            pcall(function() remote:InvokeServer("requestPurchaseZone") end)
            task.wait(5)
        end
    end)
end)

Upgrades.newToggle("Auto Teleport Best", "TP to highest zone", false, function(v)
    getgenv().Config.AutoTeleportBest = v
    task.spawn(function()
        local remote = getRemotePath():WaitForChild("ZonesService"):WaitForChild("RemoteFunction")
        while getgenv().Config.AutoTeleportBest do
            pcall(function()
                local best = 0
                for _, z in ipairs(workspace.Zones:GetChildren()) do
                    local n = tonumber(z.Name)
                    if n and z:FindFirstChild("Gate") and z.Gate:FindFirstChild("ClientGateBlocker_"..z.Name) and z.Gate["ClientGateBlocker_"..z.Name].CanCollide == false then
                        if n > best then best = n end
                    end
                end
                remote:InvokeServer("requestTeleportZone", best + 1)
            end)
            task.wait(10)
        end
    end)
end)

Upgrades.newToggle("Auto Upgrade Tree", "Dynamic Buy Upgrades", false, function(v)
    getgenv().Config.AutoUpgrade = v
    task.spawn(function()
        local remote = getRemotePath():WaitForChild("UpgradeService"):WaitForChild("RemoteFunction")
        while getgenv().Config.AutoUpgrade do
            pcall(function()
                local frame = Player.PlayerGui.Root.UpgradeScreen.UpgradeContent.Frame
                for _, t in ipairs(frame:GetChildren()) do
                    local id = t.Name:match("^(%S+)Tile")
                    if id then remote:InvokeServer("requestUnlock", id) end
                end
            end)
            task.wait(5)
        end
    end)
end)

-- ==========================================
-- SETTINGS TAB
-- ==========================================
Settings.newButton("Manual Save Config", "Save settings now", function() Save() end)

-- PERSISTENT LOOPS (Speed, Anti-AFK, Ignore)
task.spawn(function()
    while task.wait(0.5) do
        -- Character Speed
        pcall(function()
            if Player.Character and Player.Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
                Player.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = getgenv().Config.CharSpeed
            end
        end)
        
        -- Anti-AFK
        pcall(function()
            VirtualUser:CaptureController()
            VirtualUser:ClickButton2(Vector2.new())
        end)
    end
end)

Player.Idled:Connect(function()
    VirtualUser:CaptureController()
    VirtualUser:ClickButton2(Vector2.new())
end)

print("NZNT Hub Finalized | Auto-Focus One Target Integrated!")
